# Third Party

Vendored dependency staging area.

Pinned dependencies:

- Mbed TLS `mbedtls-3.6.7` for HTTPS/TLS support.

Planned pins:

- Mongoose for portable HTTP server/client when moving beyond the minimal desktop prototype.
- yyjson if the in-tree JSON utility becomes insufficient.
- borealis + nanovg for the Switch/PSV UI.
